{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140338022961C30DFFE2E191F0"}"},"total":60},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616649141138162494","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很专业，案子多，没有复杂的感情戏，好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773392428,"group_id":"7582577524547259417","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随性即随行","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9yIJxOm0jhbxS+jBthFE1s=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d769c986fadb4be9aaae5f0796c57eba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617374&x-signature=QiNZy%2FmQ%2FuUrK3j%2BdDZCOXkCXkI%3D","user_id":"110562198171","user_name":"小初🍹🍹🍹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110562198171","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582577524547259417","book_info":{"abstract":"【法医】+【破案】+【都市刑侦】+【悬疑推理】+【硬核破案】
坏消息：高考后觉醒系统，十年没反应，我差点把自己送进精神病院！
好消息：系统激活了，但激活条件竟然是“警察编制”？！
法医天才白秋林，从录取通知书到博士毕业，整整十年，系统都处于【未激活】状态！
就在他以为这辈子就是个摆设时，第一次以正式警察身份踏入凶案现场——
【叮！神级法医系统激活！新手礼包：大师级现场勘察！】
从此，他为死者言，让尸体开口说话！殊不知，当痕迹学、心理侧写、现场重建等技能一一解锁，整个警界为之颤抖！“这家伙...怎么什么都会！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d2201f26eb23864bc9665bec7a1614d1","author":"悲伤打字姬","author_id":"","book_id":"7582577524547259417","book_name":"全能法医：这家伙怎么什么都会！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582577596039168537","read_count":"26741","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"796056"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"333","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,推理,系统,打脸,全能,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2a906e3076c6465bb9463c25b2f0e0f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257019&x-signature=67SIDkX7wLXnKuT25XGNlVtPRgc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"87689044621","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140338022961C30DFFE2E191F0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9156,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7618109324336710425","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看得出来作者已经在很努力的写了，总体逻辑性不错，也没有什么乱七八糟的感情线，不是不能接受感情戏，但实在受不了给配角强行降智以及拿着无理取闹当有趣。看主角在系统里像老黄牛一样勤勤恳恳的训练和学习，不太认同系统体罚和统子冷嘲热讽这块，因为主角已经很拼了。主角光环太亮了，以至于周边的人都黯淡无光，有种主角随时过劳死而周围人都在摸鱼的感觉，这点不太好，主角可以更专业更敏锐，但不能只靠他一个人破案，所有角色应该像齿轮一样，互相咬合着推进。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773734307,"group_id":"7582577524547259417","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3186799258645469"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582577524547259417","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"424"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":154635,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":176051,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7614125485029098265","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，虽然有系统，但不是直接给能力，而是通过训练来提升，逻辑性也不错！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772804945,"group_id":"7582577524547259417","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5mgE55aZ80/zkW8u26SSRZqJf18q9Byr9SgsoiuiKzc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-
